---
title: "Temporal Projection View Widget"
---

## Overview

Developer documentation for `TemporalProjectionViewWidget`, which displays 2D projections of data collapsed across temporal windows.

## Source Location

`src/WhiskerToolbox/Plots/TemporalProjectionViewWidget/`

## Architecture

*TODO: Document widget architecture, state management, and key classes.*

## Key Classes

- `TemporalProjectionViewWidget` — Main widget class

## See Also

- [Plot Widget Guide](../plot_widget_guide.md)
